ab: Diyax saya pa dsan nami na han mita ccamac ka mptusa, tbku nami rhngun hhan mari kipu.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: Mtmay nami han mita ccamac daw, rmngaw ka mptusa: “Kkluwan qduda ka brah, kkluwan quyu ka bukuy, usa nanaq sdmhaw qmita kana.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: Micu ku quyu ka yaku, so kiya uxay ku qmita kkluwan quyu.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: Wada ku qmita ou balay qduda, wa mniq babaw qhuni sskaya ka qqduda, qmnita ku wa mniq cka bling qhuni mtaqi ka tukung uri.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: Kcka han mita ccamac pa hay, niqan dapa ngucul, dapa dmay mi lklic tora, uxay mu bay qntan kndadax cuxal ka kana ccmac ni, mqaras ku balay wada mu balay bay qtan diyax saya da.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: Ou balay ka pnsingan mu sasing, han mu pqita tama bubu mu.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: Babaw niya daw, tuhuy ku tama bubu mu msupu miyah.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
